candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line on the income statement; best semantic match for total revenue/sales.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.
Balance sheet accrual asset, not top-line revenue.

candidates.row_label: Current accruals and current deferred income including current contract liabilities
candidates.why: Liability balance sheet item, not reported revenue.
Deferred income liability, not revenue recognized in the period.

variables.notes: Selected the reported income statement revenue line as the priority revenue label.

candidates.why: Most direct cost-of-sales style line available; appears in operating expense section and fits direct product/service costs better than overhead rows.
Inventory-related balance sheet label, not period expense/COGS.

variables.notes: No explicit 'Cost of sales' line exists; 'Goods for resale' is the closest direct-cost expense row.

candidates.why: Operating overhead bucket and strong SG&A component candidate.
Personnel cost is a classic SG&A component when no explicit SG&A subtotal exists.
Capitalized R&D is not an operating expense line and should not be used as SG&A expense.
Could be R&D expense, but it appears in supplemental/disclosure area and should only be included in SG&A if clearly part of operating overhead bucket selection.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet gross asset disclosure, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: R:nc. No explicit SG&A subtotal exists, so selected operating overhead component rows. Added 'Other Operating Expense' from the full preview because it is a clear SG&A-type overhead row but was missing from the candidate list. Excluded 'Goods for resale' as COGS and excluded depreciation/amortization/impairment rows. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Other Operating Expense

candidates.why: Capitalized R&D is not the income statement R&D expense target.

Amortization of prior R&D assets, not current-period R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not period R&D expense.

variables.notes: Mapped to the dedicated R&D line. It appears below operating result in the preview, so it was not added to XSGA_COMPONENTS to avoid misclassifying supplemental disclosure as operating overhead.

candidates.why: Best single recurring finance-cost line; preferable when granular components would create overlap/double counting across years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring interest component, but selecting it together with 'Financial costs' would risk double counting.
Not finance cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Recurring interest component in disclosure, but overlaps with broader financial costs line.
Balance sheet liability, not interest expense.

variables.notes: Used the total recurring finance-cost line to avoid double counting with lease-interest component disclosures.

candidates.why: Best available equity line and appears to equal total equity; no separate non-controlling interest line is shown.

candidates.row_label: Other equity including profit/loss for the year
candidates.why: Equity component, not full book equity.
Could be total equity including NCI, but identical to 'Equity' and no separate NCI line is presented.
Balancing row, not book equity target.
Balancing row, not book equity target.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet size, not equity.

variables.notes: Selected 'Equity' as book equity. No separate owner/parent-vs-NCI split is shown, and 'Total Equity & Minority Interest' matches the same values, suggesting no material minority interest line is present.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line, but blank and not the preferred balance sheet NCI line.
Income statement allocation line, blank and not a balance sheet NCI line.
Aggregate total equity figure, not a standalone minority interest line; using it would double count with BE.

variables.notes: No standalone balance sheet minority interest/non-controlling interest line is present. Since BE uses 'Equity', MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.
